title: Exhaustive test suite: happy path + every rejection and boundary
acceptance_criteria: Cover percent rounding, fixed clamping, and the 100%/over-subtotal edges.
Cover inclusive expiry exactly at expiresAt and rejection past it.
Cover minSubtotal, malformed codes, bad percent values, non-integer subtotals.
Suite is deterministic (fixed now) and runs with `node --test`, zero install.
